Who I Am

About Me

Location Greater Noida, UP
University Galgotias University
Specialization Cybersecurity & Forensics
CGPA 8.43 / 10
Status ● Available

Building intelligent solutions at the intersection of AI & Data

I'm a Computer Science Engineering student at Galgotias University with a deep passion for Generative AI and Data Analytics. My journey started with a curiosity for how machines can learn and reason, leading me to build real-world AI-powered applications.

I specialize in designing end-to-end AI solutions — from integrating large language models and crafting precise prompts to building interactive dashboards that turn raw data into decision-ready insights using Power BI, Tableau, and Python.

With hands-on experience in LLM integration (Google Gemini, Claude AI), voice AI (ElevenLabs), and fullstack development (React.js, Supabase), I bridge the gap between technical AI capabilities and real-world user needs.
